page.title: World Studio
page.subtitleCreate: Create a world from source text

routeCapabilityControls.noAvailableModel: No available model for current route.
routeCapabilityControls.emptyLocalHint: Local has no available model for this profile.

routeConfig.intro: World extraction and daily chat have different model requirements. Configure dedicated coarse/fine routes here.
routeConfig.ready: Routes are ready. Return to workflow and continue.
routeConfig.expertModeDesc: Controls advanced diagnostics/tuning visibility only. Routing behavior is unchanged.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.noPublishedWorld: No published world available for maintenance.
workspace.noDraft: No draft yet. Start from source parsing.

noAccess.title: Cannot Access World Studio
noAccess.description: Your account does not have an active world access entitlement.

studioStatus.title: Studio Status
studioStatus.atomicHint: Current task is atomic and cannot be paused.

error.phase1QualityGateBlocked: Extraction finished, but quality gate failed. Add evidence and retry.
error.eventEvidenceRequired: Primary events are missing evidence. Cannot continue.
error.eventGraphInvalid: Event graph is incomplete. Fix primary events first.
error.contextOverflow: Input is too long. System will auto-shrink chunks and retry.
error.taskConflict: Another task is running. Complete or cancel it first.
error.routeConfigRequired: Please complete coarse/fine route config first.
error.maintenanceConflict: Remote snapshot changed. Reload remote content first.
error.providerTimeout: Model response timed out. Retry later.
error.noEventIdFound: No event id found in events payload.
error.noLorebookIdFound: No lorebook id found in first lorebook item.

banner.synthesizeCompletedWithDnaGapsAndEmbeddi: Synthesize completed with DNA gaps and embedding attention required.
banner.synthesizeCompletedEnrichDegraded: Initial world cut completed with enrichment warnings
banner.extractionQualityGateBlocked: Extraction finished with quality gate block

notice.cloudRouteIncomplete: Cloud route requires connector and model.
notice.cloudModelUnavailable: Selected Cloud model is unavailable on connector.
notice.embeddingNotRequired: No lorebooks available for embedding index.
notice.embeddingNotBuilt: Embedding index is not built yet.
notice.reloadRemoteReplaced: Reloaded remote maintenance snapshot and replaced local unsaved changes. {{summary}}.
notice.synthesizeCompletedMissingDna: Synthesize completed, but missing DNA for: {{characters}}
notice.synthesizeCompletedEnrichDegraded: Initial world cut completed, but detail enrichment failed. Review and adjust the draft before deciding whether to continue creating the world.
notice.synthesizeCompletedReady: Synthesize completed. Draft editor is ready.
notice.resumeStateMissing: Resume state missing. Please rerun extraction.
notice.noFailedChunksMatchedCode: No failed chunks matched code={{code}} under scope={{scope}}.
notice.noFailedChunksMatchedScope: No failed chunks matched retry scope: {{scope}}.
notice.qualityGateRefreshProjectionFailed: Quality gate refresh aborted: start-time projection failed.
notice.adoptedRemoteSnapshot: Adopted remote snapshot version. Retry save/sync when ready.
notice.extractionPaused: Extraction paused. Resume task to continue.
notice.extractionRetryCompletedWarnConfirm: Failed chunks re-extracted with warnings. Confirm checkpoints before synthesize.
notice.extractionCompletedWarnConfirm: Extraction completed with warnings. Confirm checkpoints before synthesize.
notice.extractionRetryBlocked: Retry completed, but quality gate is still blocked. Try switching Fine model and rerun failed chunks again.
notice.extractionBlocked: Extraction completed, but quality gate blocked synthesize. Try switching Fine model and rerun extract.
notice.extractionAdaptiveShrinkCompleted: Extraction completed after adaptive chunk shrink. Confirm checkpoints.
notice.extractionAdaptiveShrinkWarn: Extraction completed after adaptive chunk shrink with warnings. Confirm checkpoints.
notice.extractionAdaptiveShrinkBlocked: Extraction retried with smaller chunks, but quality gate is still blocked.
notice.publishBackendFailedDraftSaved: Publish request reached backend but failed (HTTP 500). Draft {{draftId}} is still saved.

sourceInput.title: Source Input
sourceInput.description: Upload a txt/md file or paste raw text. Extraction runs chunk-by-chunk with progress tracking.
sourceInput.filePreviewHint: Preview only. Parsing uses streaming chunks, not full UI text buffering.
sourceInput.retryWithFineRoute: Retry failed chunks with Fine route

checkpoints.title: Checkpoints
checkpoints.empty: Run Phase 1 first to unlock checkpoint selection.
checkpoints.runSynthesisHint: Requires a start time, selected characters, and complete non-future primary evidence.
checkpoints.primaryMissingEvidence: {{count}} primary events are still missing evidence refs.
checkpoints.primaryRequired: WORLD_STUDIO_EVENT_GRAPH_INVALID: at least one primary event is required.

phase2Panel.title: Synthesis Result
phase2Panel.draftQualityBody: The initial world cut succeeded, but some weak fields remain thin or empty. Continue into Review and adjust the draft before deciding whether to continue creating the world.
phase2Panel.draftQualityTitle: Draft quality status: detail enrichment incomplete
phase2Panel.agentConceptPlaceholder: Role positioning, language style, behavior principles

eventDetail.title: Event Details
eventDetail.missingEvidence: PRIMARY events with `PAST` or `ONGOING` horizon require evidence refs.

evidenceEditor.title: Evidence Refs
evidenceEditor.requiredHint: Primary event requires at least 1 evidence ref.

draftEditor.title: Draft Editor
draftEditor.description: Structured editing path. Raw JSON is only shown in debug folds.

worldBase.title: World Base
worldBase.description: Structured editor for core world settings.
worldBase.explainer: Base keeps the world card readable and publication-ready. Time rules stay under worldview.timeModel, while clock truth is shown here as read-only runtime state.
worldBase.summaryHint: This page owns publish-facing world basics; deeper time and rule structure still belongs in Worldview.
worldBase.commonFieldsNote: Edit readable, publish-facing base fields here; deeper time and rule structure still belongs in Worldview.
worldBase.deepEditNote: Only open this area when you need to verify runtime clock truth; it is not intended to become another complex editor.
worldBase.rawJsonEmpty: There is no raw patch to display right now.
worldBase.name: Name
worldBase.clockConfigDescription: Runtime clock anchors, pause state, and era state are maintained here as world truth.
worldBase.identityDescription: Keep the canonical world card clear, distinctive, and ready for release surfaces.
worldBase.narrativeDescription: Capture the longer-form copy that helps creators and readers understand what this world is about.
worldBase.clockDescription: This runtime clock truth is currently readable here, but not editable from Base.
worldBase.clockEmpty: No runtime clock state is available yet for this world.

worldview.title: Worldview
worldview.explainer: `world.rules` now belongs to `worldview.coreSystem.rules`, and `languages` is maintained as a shared worldview truth module.
worldview.ready: All required worldview modules are ready.
worldview.patternHint: Pattern: overview chooses the current layer, inspect drawer handles quick checks, and focus editor handles deep structure edits.

timeModel.title: Time Model
timeModel.description: Calendars, temporal anchors, and the rules that describe how time moves.

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle
lifecycle.description: Long-running phases, cycles, and how beings or systems evolve over time.

coreSystem.title: Core System
coreSystem.description: Rules, systems, constraints, and shared mechanics that define how the world works.

causality.title: Causality
causality.description: What drives change, how consequences propagate, and how outcomes stay consistent.

languages.title: Languages
languages.description: Shared language truth used by the world itself and its inhabitants.

existences.title: Existences
existences.description: The beings, races, and life forms that are allowed to exist in this world.

resources.title: Resources
resources.description: Scarcity, materials, currencies, and how resources circulate.

spaceTopology.title: Space Topology
spaceTopology.description: Places, boundaries, travel paths, and how the world is spatially organized.

structures.title: Structures
structures.description: Organizations, factions, and the scaffolding that shapes social order.

visualGuide.title: Visual Guide
visualGuide.description: Visual motifs, aesthetic anchors, and references that keep the world visually coherent.

narrativeHooks.title: Narrative Hooks
narrativeHooks.description: Themes, tensions, and story-facing hooks that support downstream drafting.

drawer.label: Inspect
drawer.defaultDescription: Inspect this slice before deciding whether it needs a deeper editor.

editor.objectHint: Primitive fields edit inline. Nested fields can be inspected one level deeper.

groups.timeDescription: Define how time moves, how it is modeled, and how long-running world phases are described.
groups.rulesDescription: Capture the systems, constraints, and causality logic that other surfaces should treat as canonical.
groups.cultureDescription: Record languages, beings, and resources that describe what can exist and how the world is inhabited.
groups.structureDescription: Maintain the world's topology, built structures, and visual guidance in one grouped surface.
groups.narrativeDescription: Keep narrative hooks together so downstream drafting and release review have a stable storytelling spine.

lorebooks.title: Lorebooks
lorebooks.description: Start from the overview, use the inspect drawer for quick edits, and enter the focus editor only when the entry is complex.
lorebooks.invalidRows: {{count}} lorebooks are missing `key`. Fix them before sync.
lorebooks.name: name
lorebooks.inspectDescription: Inspect this entry first, then decide whether it needs deeper editing.

structure.rootHint: Inspect top-level fields here. Nested objects can continue one level deeper.
structure.objectHint: Primitive fields edit inline. Nested objects and arrays can be inspected one level deeper.
structure.nestedHint: Open this field to continue inspecting deeper structure.
structure.arrayNestedHint: Nested array items can be inspected and edited one level deeper.

eventGraphMaintenance.title: Events (Primary / Secondary)
eventGraphMaintenance.modeHint: `replace` archives existing active events first, then writes the current graph as a new active set; `merge` only does incremental upsert.

eventGraphEditor.summaryEmpty: No summary yet. Enter focus edit to add event context, cause, process, and result.
eventGraphEditor.noSecondaryEventsForParent: No secondary events under the selected parent.
eventGraphEditor.selectEventToEdit: Select an event to edit details.
eventGraphEditor.healthyHint: Dependency graph, parent links, and primary evidence are all valid.

phase1.title: Extraction Result (Phase 1)
phase1.empty: Run ingest/extract first. The parser output will show narrative arc, character profiles, and timeline.
phase1.subtitle: Aliases were normalized and narrative arc was synthesized from extracted graph.
phase1.previewPrimaryEventsEmpty: Primary events have not been extracted yet.
phase1.previewSecondaryEventsEmpty: Secondary events have not been extracted yet.
phase1.previewTimelineEmpty: Timeline nodes have not been extracted yet.
phase1.previewCharactersEmpty: Characters have not been extracted yet.
phase1.worldSettingEmpty: World setting has not been extracted yet.
phase1.narrativeArcEmpty: Narrative arc is not complete yet.
phase1.recoveredFromSnapshot: Phase 1 result was recovered from local snapshot. Confirm at checkpoints before continuing.
phase1.primaryMissingAfterRecovery: Recovered snapshot misses primary events. Please run extraction again.

workflow.workspaceDescription: Switch between published worlds and draft workspaces.
workflow.stageNavDescription: Jump between the major creation stages.
workflow.domainNavDescription: Switch between world, agent, asset, and release maintenance views.
workflow.sectionNavDescription: Switch between the active domain's maintenance sections.

registry.title: World-owned agents
registry.empty: No world-owned agents are available yet.
registry.draftCandidatesDescription: Characters extracted from the draft can be promoted into world-owned agents from here.
registry.draftCandidatesEmpty: No agent draft candidates are available.
registry.pendingHint: {{count}} draft candidates still need remote agents before assets can sync cleanly.
registry.focusSummary: Focused editing belongs to the currently selected agent only; start from the roster, inspect one agent, then enter that agent's own metadata editor.

editor.title: Agent Editor
editor.empty: Select a world-owned agent from Registry to inspect and edit its metadata.
editor.subtitle: Metadata editing is available now; full persona editing remains a later realm API milestone.
editor.personaDescription: Complete persona fields such as concept, scenario, greeting, rules, lorebooks, and fine-grained DNA editing will be unlocked after realm exposes a fuller agent detail contract.

synced.description: These bindings already exist remotely as world truth.

world.generatedDescription: These are local outputs produced during create or maintenance flows.
world.emptyGenerated: No local world assets are ready to inspect yet.
world.locationItemSummary: This is a locally generated location image.
world.syncedDescription: These bindings are already persisted remotely and visible to runtime consumers.
world.missingDescription: These tracked world asset slots still need generation or sync before the world asset surface feels complete.

agent.generatedDescription: These are local portrait outputs before or after they become remote media bindings.
agent.syncedDescription: These bindings already point remote agent slots at media assets.
agent.missingDescription: These generated portraits still need a remote agent match before sync can complete cleanly.

drafts.title: Drafts
drafts.description: Detailed draft selection now lives here; the workspace drawer keeps only quick entry points.

publish.title: Publish
publish.description: Publishing still runs through the Create review flow. Use this section to jump back into the current draft with the right mental model.
publish.recommendationDirty: Save or sync the current maintenance edits before entering the publish review flow.
publish.recommendationReady: The maintenance surface is clean. You can jump back into publish review when the draft is ready.
publish.nextStepBody: When this maintenance pass is ready, jump back into the publish review flow from here.

history.title: History
history.description: Mutation history is now a first-class release surface instead of a hidden background query.

generate.blocked: Resolve quality gate blockers before entering generation.

stageAccess.review: Generate a draft before entering review.

create.draftQualityEnrichIncompleteBody: The initial world cut succeeded, but detail enrichment is incomplete. Review and adjust the draft before deciding whether to continue creating the world.
create.draftQualityEnrichIncompleteBodyWithReas: The initial world cut succeeded, but detail enrichment did not complete successfully ({{reason}}). Review and adjust the draft before deciding whether to continue creating the world.
create.draftQualityEnrichIncompleteTitle: Draft quality status: detail enrichment incomplete
create.qualityGateBlockBody: Resolve coverage and evidence issues before synthesis.
create.routeBlockerBody: Configure coarse and fine routes before extraction can start.

review.publishReviewDescription: Freeze the draft, validate the publish checklist, then push the world into maintenance mode.

maintain.conflictBody: The remote world changed after this snapshot was loaded. Resolve the conflict before trusting local edits.
maintain.headerDescription: You are currently editing this world. The information below shows the current snapshot, local edit state, and key world stats.
maintain.localWorkspaceAutoSaved: The current workspace is automatically saved locally.
maintain.localWorkspaceSaved: The current workspace has been saved locally.
maintain.localWorkspaceSavedAt: The current workspace was saved locally at {{value}}.
maintain.savedState: Local edits are synced with the current snapshot.
maintain.remoteSyncClean: Current edits are synced to the remote snapshot.
maintain.remoteSyncPending: These sections still need remote sync: {{value}}

section.label: Section Context
section.baseDescription: Keep the canonical world card readable and publication-ready.
section.baseSummary: Edit the world name, layered copy, classification, and descriptive context in one place.
section.worldviewDescription: Maintain how the world works, how it is structured, and how creators should reason about it.
section.worldviewSummary: Start from the module overview, then drill down into the entries that need editing.
section.eventsDescription: Curate the published event graph that downstream systems will treat as canonical world sequence.
section.eventsSummary: Review graph shape, evidence expectations, and sync mode before writing timeline truth.
section.lorebooksDescription: Keep lore entries coherent, queryable, and ready for sync.
section.lorebooksSummary: Add and curate reusable lore rows, then sync them once the set is valid.
section.registryDescription: Start from the roster, inspect one agent at a time, and enter focused metadata editing only when that specific agent needs work.
section.registrySummary: This page should stay roster-first: scan the world-owned agents, inspect one, then enter focused editing for that agent only when needed.
section.editorDescription: This focused editor belongs to the currently selected agent only. Inspect its truth, watch runtime signal, and edit the metadata fields that are currently writable.
section.editorSummary: Full persona editing remains future-facing; this view is a focused editor for one agent, not a top-level mode for the whole roster.
section.worldAssetsDescription: Compare generated assets, synced bindings, and missing world asset coverage.
section.worldAssetsSummary: The next step should be obvious: generate, sync, or verify.
section.agentAssetsDescription: Review which portraits already map to remote agents and which still need linkage.
section.agentAssetsSummary: Use this section to close the gap between local portraits and remote agent bindings.
section.draftsDescription: Track which drafts exist, which one is active, and where to jump back into the create flow.
section.draftsSummary: Releases should feel like a release surface, not a hidden transport panel.
section.publishDescription: Use the current maintenance state to decide when it is safe to jump back into publish review.
section.publishSummary: This section should answer whether the draft is ready to leave maintenance and re-enter publish flow.
section.historyDescription: Read mutation history as a release timeline instead of a hidden technical log.
section.historySummary: What changed, where it changed, and when it changed should all be easy to scan.

expertDrawer.diagnosticsSubtitle: Extraction, coverage, and story projection metrics.
expertDrawer.historySubtitle: Audit-only mutation history for the current world.
expertDrawer.routingSubtitle: Route configuration, embedding readiness, and expert-mode controls.
expertDrawer.taskDetailsSubtitle: Live task state, notices, and recovery information.
